name: @fiducia/sync
description: Policy-driven local-first sync for fiducia.cloud over IndexedDB/localStorage and Postgres/Supabase, powered by fiducia-sync-core WASM.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit --strict --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --lib ES2022,DOM tests/types.test.ts
scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir sdk/pkg -- --package fiducia-sync-core --features wasm --locked && node sdk/scripts/allow-generated-wasm-in-npm.mjs
scripts.build:wasm-web: cd .. && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-web -- --package fiducia-sync-core --features wasm --locked
scripts.build:admin-bundle: npm run build:wasm-web && esbuild admin/entry.mjs --bundle --format=iife --target=es2020 --loader:.wasm=binary --outfile=admin/dist/fiducia-sync-admin.js && cp admin/dist/fiducia-sync-admin.js ../../fiducia-admin.rs/assets/fiducia-sync.js
